title: Ship Rotation, Thrust, Inertia, Drag, and Speed Limits · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for ship rotation, thrust, inertia, drag, and speed limits and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, pygame-ce, SDL, display, input, audio, filesystem, packaging, GPU, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for frame-rate-independent inertial ship controller. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Update angle from action intent and derive a normalized facing vector without overwriting velocity direction.
Integrate acceleration into velocity and velocity into position with explicit seconds and bounded time.
Preserve momentum and apply a time-scaled damping model whose behavior is tested across frame rates.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ship Feel Evidence
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Asteroids team handles case 1650 during a controller-remapping accessibility review. Build deterministic Python evidence to integrate rotation, thrust, inertia, drag, and speed limits with frame-rate-independent Vector2 motion; preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets; then cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Tune rotation, acceleration, drag, cap, input latency, and feedback against recorded player tasks and objective traces.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Ship Feel Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for tune rotation, acceleration, drag, cap, input latency, and feedback against recorded player tasks and objective traces. content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Ship Facing has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Ship Facing, name the player, revision, runtime, seed, input, time, coordinate, state, entity, collision, render, cue, accessibility, package, release, and desktop-transfer boundary, Ship Facing precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Ship Facing, trace this concrete input and predict event, intent, simulation, collision, cleanup, rendering, cue, accessibility, failure, pause, rollback, recovery, and desktop evidence before reviewing it: A quiz Asteroids team handles case 8756 during a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial. Build deterministic Python evidence to integrate rotation, thrust, inertia, drag, and speed limits with frame-rate-independent Vector2 motion; test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases; then cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Update angle from action intent and derive a normalized facing vector without overwriting velocity direction.

For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Ship Facing, challenge the documented misconception with changed-frame-rate, stall, seam, input, device, collision, cue, accessibility, save, package, failure, recovery, and controlled desktop-transfer evidence: The ship must always move exactly where it faces.

options.text: Declare Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python player outcome, revision, runtime, seed, input trace, accessibility profile, and frame, entity, collision, audio, and memory budgets for the quiz Ship Facing case
Predict Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python event, intent, simulation, collision, cleanup, rendering, cue, failure, pause, rollback, and recovery outcomes for the quiz Ship Facing case
Run the smallest deterministic Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python simulation model and retain exact intermediate and changed-case results for the quiz Ship Facing case

Change one Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python frame rate, stall, seam, device, collision, cue, save, package, or release condition, verify bounded rejection or repair, and state desktop transfer limits for the quiz Ship Facing case

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Ship Feel Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Ship Feel Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Asteroids team handles case 9188 during a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial. Build deterministic Python evidence to integrate rotation, thrust, inertia, drag, and speed limits with frame-rate-independent Vector2 motion; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Tune rotation, acceleration, drag, cap, input latency, and feedback against recorded player tasks and objective traces.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Ship Feel Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieving Ship Feel Evidence through the concrete frame-rate-independent inertial ship controller case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Ship Feel Evidence, keep Ship Feel Evidence connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Tune rotation, acceleration, drag, cap, input latency, and feedback against recorded player tasks and objective traces.

Build deterministic Python evidence to integrate rotation, thrust, inertia, drag, and speed limits with frame-rate-independent Vector2 motion; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Tune rotation, acceleration, drag, cap, input latency, and feedback against recorded player tasks and objective traces.

For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Ship Feel Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with changed-frame-rate, stall, seam, input, device, collision, cue, accessibility, save, package, failure, recovery, and controlled desktop-transfer evidence: Good game feel is only a personal numeric preference.
